title: Shipment and Demand Notification Flow
interaction_flow: ShipmentServlet → HttpSession: getAttribute('usertype') — guard: redirect to login if null
OrderServiceImpl → Database: UPDATE orders SET shipped=1 WHERE orderid=? AND prodid=? AND shipped=0
OrderServiceImpl → ShipmentServlet: return 'Order Has been shipped successfully!!' OR 'FAILURE'
UserServiceImpl → Database: SELECT fname from users WHERE username=?
ShipmentServlet → MailMessage: orderShipped(userName, name, orderId, amount)
FansMessage → MailMessage: sendMessage('ellison.alumni@gmail.com', 'Fans Message | ...',  htmlText): String
FansMessage → User: forward to index.jsp + alert script
=== DEMAND REGISTRATION FLOW (when product quantity insufficient) ===
Customer → AddtoCart/UpdateToCart/CartServiceImpl: add item with qty > availableQty
AddtoCart → DemandBean: new DemandBean(userName, prodId, pQty - availableQty)
DemandServiceImpl → Database: SELECT from user_demand WHERE username=? AND prodid=?
DemandServiceImpl → Database: INSERT INTO user_demand VALUES(userId, prodId, demandQty)
ProductServiceImpl → Database: UPDATE product SET ... WHERE pid=?
DemandServiceImpl → Database: SELECT * FROM user_demand WHERE prodid=?
loop [for each DemandBean demand in demandList]
ProductServiceImpl → MailMessage: productAvailableNow(demand.getUserName(), userFName, prodName, prodId)
DemandServiceImpl → Database: DELETE FROM user_demand WHERE username=? AND prodid=?
ProductServiceImpl → UpdateProductSrv: return 'Product Updated Successfully! And Mail Send to customers...'
key_relationships: MailMessage delegates_to JavaMailUtil (sendMail — all email sending)
DemandBean is a POJO with fields: userName, prodId, demandQty

OrderServiceImpl: shipNow(String orderId, String prodId): String — returns 'Order Has been shipped successfully!!' or 'FAILURE'
DemandServiceImpl: addProduct(String userId, String prodId, int demandQty): boolean
MailMessage: orderShipped(String recipientEmail, String name, String transId, double transAmount): void
productAvailableNow(String recipientEmail, String name, String prodName, String prodId): void
transactionSuccess(String recipientEmail, String name, String transId, double transAmount): void
sendMessage(String toEmailId, String subject, String htmlTextMessage): String — returns SUCCESS/FAILURE
JavaMailUtil: sendMail(String recipient, String subject, String htmlTextMessage): void — protected, generic HTML mail
prepareMessage(Session, String, String, String, String): Message
FansMessage: doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse): void — reads name/email/comments params, delegates to MailMessage.sendMessage

important_notes: ShipmentServlet at @WebServlet('/ShipmentServlet') — GET/POST both delegate to doGet
FansMessage at @WebServlet('/fansMessage') — sends fan comment to fixed admin email 'ellison.alumni@gmail.com'
JavaMailUtil uses smtp.gmail.com:587 with STARTTLS; credentials from application.properties (mailer.email, mailer.password)
shipNow uses SQL: UPDATE orders SET shipped=1 WHERE orderid=? AND prodid=? AND shipped=0 (idempotent, won't re-ship)
Demand notification triggered inside ProductServiceImpl.updateProductWithoutImage only when prevQuantity < newQuantity
After notifying demand subscribers, DemandServiceImpl.removeProduct cleans up user_demand table
MailMessage.sendMessage (used by FansMessage) returns 'SUCCESS'/'FAILURE' string; other MailMessage methods return void
